expectations.text: Response shows the `runic merge abc123 def456 -m "..."` command
Merge revision file shows down_revision as a tuple, e.g. ("abc123", "def456")
Explains to run `runic upgrade head` after creating the merge revision
expectations.evidence: runic upgrade head shown in Step 2

expectations.text: Does NOT suggest manually editing existing migration files as the resolution strategy
expectations.evidence: Only creates a new merge revision via runic merge command

expectations.text: Merge revision function signature is def upgrade(op) -> None: (not using MigrationContext)
expectations.evidence: Uses `def upgrade(context: MigrationContext) -> None:` with wrong import `from runic import MigrationContext` — hallucinated API
